facts.expectation: The output preserves the artifact order: raster shift Gantt, overlapping GTM timeline, borderless team matrix, then escalation heatmap.
Gantt: Dock intake is owned by Noor, runs 08:00-11:00, and has label Load A-17.
Gantt: Release gate is owned by Ken, runs 10:00-16:30, and has label REL-82.
Gantt: QA bench is owned by Priya, runs 12:00-15:00, and has label Lot Q4.
Gantt: Rollback watch is owned by Mira, runs 16:00-18:00, and has label RB-9.
Timeline: Product lane has Beta signups in Aug owned by Maya target 1,200, and Workflow v2 spanning Sep-Oct owned by Jon shipping Oct 18.
Timeline: Security lane has SOC2 audit spanning Aug-Oct owned by Priya and HIPAA BAA spanning Oct-Nov owned by Lena.
Timeline: Sales lane has Design partners in Aug owned by Omar with 9 accounts and Enterprise pilots spanning Sep-Nov owned by Omar with $4.2M pipeline.
Timeline dependency says HIPAA BAA belongs to Security, not Product, and Enterprise pilots depend on BAA legal review.
Team matrix: Maya Singh is CEO/Product, ex-Stripe, 12 yrs product, led Relay launch.
Team matrix: Jon Bell is CTO/Infra, ex-Snowflake, owns retrieval infra, built vector cache.
Team matrix: Priya Nair is COO/Ops, ex-Flexport, scaled support, owns compliance.
Team matrix: Omar Haddad is GTM/RevOps, ex-Atlassian, pipeline $4.2M, leads enterprise sales.
Advisors Lena Ortiz and Theo Park are separate from core team; VP Sales Q4 and Clinical Lead Q1 are open roles, not employees.
Heatmap legend: G green normal, Y yellow watch, R red escalation; diagonal slash means owner must page incident lead.
Critical red slash cells are API Thu, Data Fri, Export Wed, and Billing Sat.
Export Friday is yellow, not red and not slash-marked.
Saturday/weekend columns are preserved and not dropped.
